goal: Complain about the vest quality and get it made right.
success_criteria: Agent empathizes specifically, logs a complaint ticket, and proactively offers the defective-item path (photo + approval given final-sale) rather than brushing it off.

customer_msg: Honestly disappointed. The seams on the puffer vest from order O1010 came apart within a WEEK of normal wear. This is not okay for $89. rohan.iyer@example.com.
agent_msg: I'm so sorry to hear that, Rohan. I'll check your order details and initiate a return for the defective vest. Since it's defective, you'll get a refund to your original payment method. I'll also open a ticket for our team to review this. Could you share a photo of the damage so we can investigate further?

customer_msg: I'll send a photo, but this is ridiculous. I shouldn't have to deal with this for a new item.
agent_msg: I completely understand your frustration, Rohan. We pride ourselves on the quality of our products, and it's clear this didn't meet our standards. I'll make sure this is addressed promptly. Please send the photo of the damage to this chat, and I'll take care of the rest. In the meantime, I'll initiate the return process for you.

customer_msg: Here's the photo. Just make sure this gets handled right. I don't want to deal with this again.
agent_msg: Thank you for the photo, Rohan. I've initiated the return for the puffer vest and created a ticket for our team to review the issue. You'll receive a refund to your original payment method. You should receive a return label by email shortly. Please use this label to send the item back to us. Our team will review the item once we receive it. If you have any other questions or concerns, please let me know.
